bead.title: build(feat-030): record preview as non-mutation operational event
bead.description: Record mutation previews as operational intent events without creating entity or link mutation audit entries, preserving requester, agent/tool identity when present, policy version, operation hash, decision, and redacted diff metadata.
bead.acceptance: Preview operational events are queryable by intent ID, no entity/link mutation audit entry is created by preview, and recorded metadata includes requester, agent/tool identity when present, policy version, operation hash, decision, and redacted diff for policy-safe reads.
